title: Fix model routing for 'message_routing' tasks
description: 'rate_limit' occurs 2x during 'message_routing' tasks. Routing agent to appropriate model tier would reduce this.

implementation.changes:
1. Review router config for 'message_routing' task classification
2. If 'rate_limit' == 'rate_limit': reduce primary model tier, use cheaper fallback
3. If 'rate_limit' == 'slow_response': prefer faster local models
4. If 'rate_limit' == 'wrong_model_tier': adjust task complexity scoring
5. Run: uv run python skills/intelligent-router/scripts/router.py classify 'message_routing task'

expected_improvement: Eliminate 2x rate limits/routing failures per week
deployed_notes: Deployed via intelligent-router v2.0: MEDIUM tasks now route to Llama-3.3-70B-instruct (0.40/M) instead of Sonnet proxy-1. Rate limits eliminated by moving routine tasks off Sonnet. COMPLEX tier retains Sonnet for quality-critical work.
